EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IMapLayerInfo

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Carto
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Carto.dll

Provides access to the available properties of a map layer info object.

[Guid("CA469C38-C9E4-4DC3-9C32-86AEF3B33DF2")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IMapLayerInfo

Properties

CanFind

Indicates if the layer supports the Find operation.

bool CanFind { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

CanIdentify

Indicates if the layer supports the Identify operation.

bool CanIdentify { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

CanScaleSymbols

Indicates if the layer supports symbol scaling.

bool CanScaleSymbols { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

CanSelect

Indicates if the layer supports feature selection.

bool CanSelect { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Description

The description of the layer. This property is set in the General tab of the Layer Properties dialog.

string Description { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

DisplayField

Primary display field.

string DisplayField { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Extent

The geographic extent of the layer.

IEnvelope Extent { get; }

Property Value

IEnvelope

Examples

Sample Snippet

FieldAliases

Array of strings that contains field alias for each field in Fields property.

IStringArray FieldAliases { get; }

Property Value

IStringArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

Fields

Array of attribute fields contained in the layer.

IFields Fields { get; }

Property Value

IFields

Examples

Sample Snippet

HasAttributes

Indicates if the layer has attributes.

bool HasAttributes { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

HasHyperlinks

Indicates if the layer has hyperlinks.

bool HasHyperlinks { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

HasLabels

Indicates if the layer has labels to turn on and off.

bool HasLabels { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

ID

The layer identifier. This ID is used throughout to uniquely identify the layer for all requests.

int ID { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsComposite

Indicates if the layer is a composite layer.

bool IsComposite { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsFeatureLayer

Indicates if the layer is a feature layer.

bool IsFeatureLayer { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

MaxScale

The maximum visible scale for the layer.

double MaxScale { get; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

MinScale

The minimum visible scale for the layer.

double MinScale { get; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Name

The name of the layer.

string Name { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

ParentLayerID

If the layer is a member of a composite layer, this property identifies the parent layer.

int ParentLayerID { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

SourceDescription

The description of the source information for the layer.

string SourceDescription { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

SubLayers

The list identifying the sublayers if the layer is a composite layer.

ILongArray SubLayers { get; }

Property Value

ILongArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

Type

The layer type.

string Type { get; }

Property Value

string
